scripts.sync:to-frontend: powershell -Command "Copy-Item src/pages/MapTester.tsx ../frontend/src/pages/MapTester.tsx -Force; Copy-Item src/rendering/TileRenderer.ts ../frontend/src/rendering/TileRenderer.ts -Force; Write-Host 'Synced map-generator -> frontend'"
scripts.sync:from-frontend: powershell -Command "Copy-Item ../frontend/src/pages/MapTester.tsx src/pages/MapTester.tsx -Force; Copy-Item ../frontend/src/rendering/TileRenderer.ts src/rendering/TileRenderer.ts -Force; Write-Host 'Synced frontend -> map-generator'"
